microsoft-entra-sso.error.auth_failed_me: We couldn't sign you in with your Microsoft account. This could be a temporary issue - please try again.
microsoft-entra-sso.error.unexpected_cal: An unexpected error occurred during Microsoft sign-in. Please try again.
microsoft-entra-sso.error.oauth_state_in: The OAuth state parameter does not match the expected value. This may indicate a CSRF attack.
microsoft-entra-sso.error.configuration_: Microsoft Entra SSO configuration value [:key] is missing. Please check your microsoft-entra-sso config file.
microsoft-entra-sso.error.guard_not_conf: Guard [:guard] is not configured for Microsoft Entra SSO. Add it to the 'guards' array in your microsoft-entra-sso config.
microsoft-entra-sso.error.guard_mismatch: OAuth guard mismatch. Expected [:expected_guard] but callback used [:actual_guard].
microsoft-entra-sso.error.guard_model_no: Guard [:guard] is missing a valid model class in microsoft-entra-sso config.
microsoft-entra-sso.error.model_class_no: Model class [:model] configured for Microsoft Entra SSO does not exist.
microsoft-entra-sso.error.model_missing_: Model [:model] must implement SSOAuthenticatable (and typically use the HasMicrosoftSSO trait) to support Microsoft Entra SSO.
microsoft-entra-sso.error.guard_model_mu: The guard model [:model] must extend Illuminate\Database\Eloquent\Model.
microsoft-entra-sso.error.invalid_graph_: Microsoft Graph returned an invalid response while loading the user profile.
Microsoft Graph returned an invalid response while loading group membership.
microsoft-entra-sso.error.user_not_found: No user found with Microsoft ID [:microsoft_id] and auto-registration is disabled.
microsoft-entra-sso.error.state_expired: The OAuth state has expired. Please start the Microsoft sign-in flow again.
microsoft-entra-sso.error.invalid_redire: The configured redirect URI [:uri] is invalid or not allowed.
microsoft-entra-sso.error.missing_author: The authorization code is missing from the callback request.
microsoft-entra-sso.error.missing_code_v: The PKCE code verifier is missing from the session. Please start the sign-in flow again.
